name: Buckwheat Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onion and heat oil in a pan until transparent.
2. Chop tomatoes and add to onions, cooking until soft.
3. Stir in buckwheat and rice, cooking for 1 minute.
4. Add the remaining ingredients; bring mixture to boil.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F/190°C/Gas Mark 5.
6. Simmer the mixture for 20 minutes until liquid is absorbed.
7. Adjust seasoning, transfer into a 7-inch square cake tin.
8. Place in the preheated oven and leave for 30 minutes before removing.
